name: Performance Food Group Co
business: Performance Food Group Company markets and distributes more than 250,000 food and food-related products to customers across North America, serving the food-away-from-home industry. The company operates through three segments: Foodservice, Convenience, and Specialty, offering products such as custom-cut meat, seafood, beverages, and other food items. It serves over 300,000 customer locations from 155 distribution centers.
